arts.ttl: Arsenal face daunting prospect of four-year low and historic Premier League task
arts.sum: Arsenal and Mikel Arteta are looking to snap a winless run of four Premier League games this weekend - but face a buoyant Nottingham Forest side who are looking to impose more misery

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Nottingham Forest score predicted as epic Premier League clash takes place
arts.sum: Arsenal face a tough test in the Premier League when they return from the international break, with the Gunners welcoming Nottingham Forest to the Emirates Stadium later today. We predict that Arsenal could set up in a 4-3-3 formation, with their line-up as follows: Raya; Timber, Saliba, Gabriel, Calafiori; Partey, Odegaard, Rice; Saka, Havertz, Martinelli.

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Nottingham Forest – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Arsenal host Nottingham Forest in the Premier League this weekend, aiming to end a four-game winless run. Mikel Arteta has seen his side’s title challenge stumble after four games without a win, a run that has seen Arsenal drop to fourth in the table. arts.sum: Arsenal play host to Nottingham Forest at the Emirates Stadium on Saturday afternoon in a highly-touted battle for third place, but UK football fans won't be able to watch the action unfold live on TV

arts.ttl: Report: Nottingham Forest want £20 million striker who has been compared to Sergio Aguero
Arsenal guaranteed to be without three stars vs Nottingham Forest as Bukayo Saka call confirmed
arts.sum: The Gunners welcome a high-flying Nottingham Forest to Emirates Stadium on Saturday, with Nuno Espirito-Santo's side going into the fixture with the same number of points as the home side. If Arsenal are to come away from Emirates Stadium with all three points on Saturday, they will have to do so without Ben White.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Arsenal leading chase for brilliant young Spanish talent with 6 G/A in 12 games this season
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta is slowly but surely leaning into his Spanish connection to help Arsenal in the transfer market, and one young Iberian talent could be the next player from the region to join the Gunners.
